No Poverty.reason: The course teaches "social research methods" and "data collection and analysis," which are essential tools for studying and measuring poverty as per Target 1.2.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The taught "Social Research Methods" are fundamental in public health for studying well-being and disease prevalence, which supports targets like 3.4 and 3.d.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it is a form of tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly develops skills like "handling complex data" for future employment (Target 4.4).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course directly builds capacity for "data collection and analysis," which is crucial for Target 17.18 (high-quality data) and 17.19 (measurements of progress).
